creator: lev@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello, bug-followup.

 Yep, it seems to be hardware problems. I've remove half a memory and
could not reproduce it. 10 new passes of memtest86+ doesn't show
problem with this memory, but it seems, that 6Gb is too much for this
MoBo or somerthing like this.

-- 
// Black Lion AKA Lev Serebryakov <lev@FreeBSD.org>
